# MuleSoft Email Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.8) of Email Connector documentation.
> See [Email Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Email Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Set Parsing Text File Attachment as Body Message](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-attachment.md)
- [Count Messages with Email Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-connector-count-messages.md)
- [Email Connector Reference 1.8](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-documentation.md)
- [Email Connector Examples 1.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-examples.md)
- [Connect to Gmail with Email Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-gmail.md)
- [List Emails with Email Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-list.md)
- [Move Messages Between Folders for IMAP/S Connection Providers Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-move-folder.md)
- [Send Emails with Email Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-send.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Email Connector 1.8](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-studio-configuration.md)
- [Trigger a Flow When Receiving a New Email Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-trigger.md)
- [Troubleshooting Email Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-troubleshooting.md)
- [Email Connector XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/email-xml-maven.md)
- [Email Connector 1.8](https://docs.mulesoft.com/email-connector/latest/index.md)
